notes: Leaf file providing generic-CommRing base cases (q=2, q=3) of Silverman III.6.2; all six theorems are one-line specialisations consumed by QthRoots.lean and Route2Universal.lean. The largest proof (Φ_three_mem_expand_three_charP, 40 lines) uses a sympy-verified linear_combination witness and requires maxHeartbeats 1000000. No sorries, no mathlib overlap beyond WeierstrassCurve.b_relation.
